/tmp/codeql-scratch-3b63ee943670348a/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml-base.so.0 -o ../../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.7 "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-alloc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-backend.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-opt.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-threading.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-quants.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/gguf.cpp.o"  -lm
